return(function(U,R,K,u,I,p,t,W,Q,x,Y,z,m,F,f,b,h,g,y,w,B,S,L,l)Q,f,F,b,x,S,W,m,B,Y,y,L,l,w,h,z,g={},function(U)W[U]=W[U]-(-417977-(-417978))if W[U]==133394+-133394 then W[U],Q[U]=nil,nil end end,function(U,A)local R=S(A)local K=function(K,u,I,p,t)return x(U,{K;u;I,p,t},A,R)end return K end,function(U,A)local R=S(A)local K=function(K,u,I,p,t,Q)return x(U,{K,u;I;p,t,Q},A,R)end return K end,function(x,K,u,I)local
